data.description: UiPath Set to Join S&P MidCap 400 and Versant Media Group to Join S&P SmallCap 600

data.title: FCPT buys an Olive Garden property in Illinois for $2.2 million in a corporate-operated, long-term lease deal.
data.description: Based in Mill Valley, California, Four Corners Property Trust (NYSE:FCPT) recently acquired an Olive Garden property for $2.2 million. The property, situated in a bustling area in Illinois, operates under a corporate-owned long-term triple net lease with roughly eight years remaining. FCPT is a real estate investment trust that focuses on owning and obtaining top-tier, net-leased restaurant and retail properties.

data.title: Pelthos Therapeutics appoints Andrew Einhorn to its board, leveraging his 40+ years of expertise in finance and life sciences.
data.description: An experienced executive with over 40 years of expertise in finance, capital markets, and life sciences has joined the team.

data.title: Motive Technologies files for IPO with SEC for Class A common stock, plans to list on NYSE as "MTVE." Shares and price TBD.
data.description: In San Francisco, Motive Technologies, Inc., a leading AI platform for physical operations, revealed plans for an initial public offering of its Class A common stock. The company filed a registration statement on Form S-1 with the US Securities and Exchange Commission ("SEC") for the offering. Motive intends to list its Class A common stock on the New York Stock Exchange using the symbol "MTVE." Details such as the number of shares to be offered and the price range for the potential offering have not been disclosed yet.
ROK: Vehicle acquisition tax to be reduced until end of June next year... Fuel tax cut also extended by two months

data.title: QGold closed $1.69M flow-through financing, issuing Common Shares. Check SEDAR+ for further details.
data.description: On December 23, 2025, Q-Gold Resources Ltd. completed its non-brokered private placement financing of common shares on a “flow-through” basis, raising $1,694,503. The company, listed on the TSXV as QGR, OTCQB as QGLDF, and Börse Frankfurt as QX9G, expressed satisfaction with the outcome of the offering. Further details about the transaction can be found in the press release from December 12, 2025, accessible on the Company’s SEDAR+ profile at www.sedarplus.ca.

data.title: American Hotel Income Properties REIT LP plans to repurchase shares through a normal course issuer bid. TSX has approved their notice.
data.description: In Vancouver, British Columbia on December 23, 2025, American Hotel Income Properties REIT LP (AHIP) disclosed that the Toronto Stock Exchange (TSX) has approved its intention to proceed with a normal course issuer bid (NCIB). AHIP is listed under symbols TSX: HOT.UN, TSX: HOT.U, TSX: HOT.DB.V.

data.title: Shanda Group founder Tianqiao Chen leads AI ventures - Decoded human-AI collaboration - boosting visibility.
data.description: In December 23, 2025, in San Mateo, California, Shanda Group has gained increased attention as a result of multiple new ventures that have been unveiled recently. Founder Tianqiao Chen has been pivotal in driving this surge, with a strategic emphasis on core aspects of the business. This resurgence has been marked by a variety of incubated projects that have captured the interest of the public and investors alike.

data.title: UiPath to join S&P MidCap 400, replaces Synovus Financial; Versant Media Group to join S&P SmallCap 600.
data.description: On December 23, 2025, S&P Dow Jones Indices announced changes to the S&P MidCap 400 and S&P SmallCap 600 indices. UiPath Inc. (NYSE: PATH) will replace Synovus Financial Corp. (NYSE: SNV) in the S&P MidCap 400. This change will be effective before the market opens on Friday. This adjustment reflects the dynamic nature of the market as UiPath Inc. steps into the S&P MidCap 400, impacting investment strategies and the performance of both indices. Investors and market participants should take note of this shift in the composition of these indices.

data.title: Mountain Mike’s Pizza is ranked #7 most loved among U.S. restaurant chains and #9 overall on Yelp's Most Loved Brands of 2025 list.
data.description: In Irvine, California, Mountain Mike’s Pizza has been recognized as the seventh most popular restaurant chain and the ninth most loved brand overall in Yelp’s rankings for 2025.

data.title: 100 Black Men of America partners with Operation HOPE for AI initiative to promote financial and AI literacy in underserved communities.
data.description: On December 23, 2025, in Atlanta, the leading African American mentoring and leadership development organization, 100 Black Men of America, Inc., disclosed its collaboration with Operation HOPE's HOPE AI initiative. This initiative, aimed at a national scale, focuses on...

data.title: Off-Broadway premiere of "We Three Kings" on Dec. 10, 2025 received rave reviews for emotional depth and stellar performances.
data.description: A talented ensemble has delivered a powerful performance of an ancient tale at the Theater Center in New York. The production, titled "We Three Kings: The Story Behind the Story," premiered on December 10, 2025, and has received high praise for its emotional depth and compelling drama. This Off-Broadway show has captivated audiences with its stellar cast, bringing the story to life with precision and force. The numbers involved in this theatrical success include a premiere date of December 10, 2025, in New York City.

data.title: First Atlantic completes private funding without warrants, with 9.9% top-up by strategic investor under rights agreement.
data.description: First Atlantic has successfully completed a private placement financing without warrants after a strategic investor exercised a 9.9% top-up right as per the Investor Rights Agreement. This move has brought in a significant amount of funding for the company, further solidifying its financial position.

data.title: Intech S&P Mid Cap Diversified Alpha ETF hits over $100M AUM in less than a year, showcasing strong performance in SMID-Cap Core.
data.description: In a remarkable achievement, the Intech S&P Mid Cap Diversified Alpha ETF (NYSE Arca: SMDX) has exceeded $100 million in assets under management within a year of its launch. This accomplishment places it among the elite 11% of active ETFs that have achieved this milestone. The fund's rapid growth underscores its strong performance and investor confidence, solidifying its position in the market.

data.title: Enchanted Fairies receives $3 million for children's causes after 40,000+ 5-star reviews and serving 60,000 families yearly.
data.description: Enchanted Fairies, a children's portrait experience in Dallas, has received over 40,000 five-star reviews and serves more than 60,000 families annually. They have donated over $3 million to charitable causes supporting children and families in need. The positive reviews highlight the brand's commitment to philanthropy, with parents appreciating the company's mission-driven values and support for kids. Enchanted Fairies' giving includes support for children facing medical challenges, experiences for families in need, and partnerships creating joyful moments for children. The brand's philanthropy is integrated into its operations and has not hindered its rapid national growth.
